query:
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, serviceType, customerExternalId 
FROM services 
WHERE planName LIKE '%Aspley%' OR planName LIKE '%aspley%' OR planName LIKE '%S1UMC%'
LIMIT 5;
